Class RationalEvidence

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.philosophy.epistemology.Evidence
org.jscience.social.philosophy.epistemology.RationalEvidence
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named
public class RationalEvidence extends Evidence
Evidence based on logical reasoning, mathematical proofs, or a priori analysis.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    • RationalEvidence

      public RationalEvidence(String source, String description, Quantity<Dimensionless> reliability)
      Creates new RationalEvidence.
      Parameters:
      source - the system or logic framework
      description - the proof or argument
      reliability - confidence in the logic/premises
